title: Workshops At FWG
description: For more information please write to emily@fwgltd.co.uk. The trial workshop will be Monday 14th May - with meet, greet and lab tour on Sunday 13th. All being well, we will run 2-day workshops in July and October. Booking will be first come-first served with a waiting list. We'll let interested parties know how to book as soon as the system has been set up.
